case_title: MICHAEL LE JENDER VS. ROBERT FULOP

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-15-2015. THE MAY-20-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16125003)

ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR MARGARET MARY FARLEY.
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF DEC-28-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. CASE SETTLED.
